statement: The 11-dataset PTBCC macro peaks at |S|=2 (0.7472), then is 0.7300 at |S|=3 and 0.7271 at |S|=4.
domain: Exact Table 3 corpus, fixed f=5, m=1.35, e=1, xi=0.001; extra prototypes drawn row-wise from Dirichlet(1).
verified_if: S=2 is the peak and the deterministic seed matching the paper setup reproduces all rounded values; additional seeds quantify initialization sensitivity.
falsified_if: A seed-independent counterexample satisfying all stated assumptions contradicts the peak/order assertion.
otherwise: BLOCKED when the unpublished paper seed prevents exact-number attribution.
negative_control: 3-Ran uses an all-entries-uniform matrix and must not be conflated with a Dirichlet(1) draw.
